definitions: One of the five colleges of Strixhaven, a magical university, known for its students who are natural and spiritual mages drawing power from the auras of living things and the essence of the dead.
A student or member of the Witherbloom college.
examples: She chose to enroll in Witherbloom.
The Witherbloom students excelled in herbalism.
He proudly wore the Witherbloom colors.
